title: Zustand store for managing collaborative review proposals and comments
purpose: Provides a centralized store for handling proposal data including adding, updating, removing, and approving/rejecting proposals per document item.
module_context: Exports a Zustand store named useProposalStore that manages proposal state with methods for CRUD operations and status updates. Includes a helper function generateId for creating unique identifiers.

steps.content: Create a timestamp string using base 36 encoding.
Generate a random string using base 36 encoding.
Combine the timestamp and random string with a hyphen separator.
Generate a unique identifier for the new proposal.
Record the current timestamp for the proposal.
Construct a complete proposal object with generated ID and timestamp.
Update the store by adding the new proposal to the specified item's proposal list.
Return the generated unique identifier for the new proposal.

methods.name: updateProposal
methods.normalized_params: (itemId: string, proposalId: string, updates: Partial<Proposal>): void

steps.content: Retrieve the list of proposals for the specified item.
Check if the proposal with the given ID exists in the list.
IF the proposal does not exist, silently return without modifying state.
ELSE update the matching proposal with the provided partial updates.
Update the store with the modified proposal list.
Retrieve the list of proposals for the specified item.
Filter out the proposal with the given ID from the list.
Update the store with the filtered proposal list.
Update the proposal type to 'approved' using the internal update mechanism.
Update the proposal type to 'rejected' using the internal update mechanism.
Update the store to set the proposal list for the specified item to an empty array.
Retrieve the list of proposals for the specified item from the store.
IF no proposals exist for the item, return an empty array.
ELSE return the list of proposals for the item.
